watermark_clear.description: No foreign brand handles/watermarks in any corner
watermark_clear.retry_prompt_template: Scan every corner and erase any creator watermark, handle, or brand tag that is not {display_name}.

brand_palette.description: Brand palette tones visible in output

logo_present.retry_prompt_template: Add MIRRA brand mark — small, Top-right corner, black serif MIRRA logotype.

text_ok.description: All text legible, no garbled/truncated characters

crop_safe.description: No text or element truncated at canvas edge

layout_intact.description: Composition coherent, not distorted, wireframe preserved

product_real.description: Product photos look real/photographed, not AI-generated

brand_voice.description: Copy tone matches brand voice guide
brand_voice.voice_tone: Warm, relatable, confident — like a friend who eats well

auto_retry.note: Auto-retry runs NANO on OUTPUT (not source) to prevent full re-generation

avoid_in_output: Studio/ring light photography (use natural window light)
AI-generated food (use real product photos via Pipeline B)
Post-compositing food after generation (food must be INPUT)
